intent_summary: Phase 5.8 case_003: pallets/markupsafe@7856c3d (PR #261 'remove deprecated code') drops soft_unicode from __init__.py + _native.py + _speedups.c and updates tests. Verifier grounds a 'tests/test_markupsafe.py passes against BOTH backends' observability claim — requires editable install so the C extension is built (pure-Python-only run would SKIP the _speedups parametrize cases).

evidence_items.summary: markupsafe upstream commit 7856c3d ('remove deprecated code', PR #261, author David Lord) drops soft_unicode from src/markupsafe/__init__.py + _native.py + _speedups.c and updates tests/conftest.py + tests/test_markupsafe.py + CHANGES.rst. Consumers must switch to soft_str.

Operator intent (cgpro session unslop-md-2): simple real Python repo with C-extension dual-backend coverage. Strategy install_target_deps_alpha (pip install -e .) ensures both _native and _speedups are exercised; cgpro biggest_trap: a green result hides skipped _speedups params if install is absent.
